comments.comment: The correct  SO2 emissions reported in 2021 is 90.62 tonnes.   The SO2 emissions decreased to 90.62 tonnes in 2021 from 125.764 tonnes in 2020 due to a decline in inlet gas volumes processed at  the Highvale 10-04 gas plant.
